scripts.build:shell: powershell -Command "node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --config vite.config.popup.ts; Copy-Item extension-shell/manifest.json -Destination dist-shell/manifest.json -Force; Copy-Item extension-shell/bridge.js, extension-shell/loader.js, extension-shell/anti-flicker.css, extension-shell/background.js -Destination dist-shell/ -Force; Copy-Item extension-shell/vendor -Destination dist-shell/ -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path dist-shell/icons -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item extension-shell/icons/logo_large.png, extension-shell/icons/logo_small_dark.png, extension-shell/icons/logo_small_light.png -Destination dist-shell/icons/ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item dist/amazon-review-studio.user.js -Destination dist-shell/ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.build:shell:personal: powershell -Command "node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --config vite.config.popup.ts; Copy-Item extension-shell/manifest-personal.json -Destination dist-shell/manifest.json -Force; Copy-Item extension-shell/bridge.js, extension-shell/loader.js, extension-shell/anti-flicker.css, extension-shell/background.js -Destination dist-shell/ -Force; (Get-Content dist-shell/background.js) -replace 'const IS_PERSONAL = false; // @FLAG_IS_PERSONAL@', 'const IS_PERSONAL = true; // @FLAG_IS_PERSONAL@' | Set-Content dist-shell/background.js; Copy-Item extension-shell/vendor -Destination dist-shell/ -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path dist-shell/icons -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item extension-shell/icons/logo_large.png, extension-shell/icons/logo_small_dark.png, extension-shell/icons/logo_small_light.png -Destination dist-shell/icons/ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Copy-Item dist/amazon-review-studio.user.js -Destination dist-shell/ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
scripts.package:zip:personal: npm run build:userscript:personal && npm run build:shell:personal && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path dist-shell\* -DestinationPath amazon-review-studio-extension-personal.zip -Force"
